ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album containing the song */,
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the song on Spotify */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song (0-100) */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute */,
  "key" TEXT /* Musical key of the song */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the song (major or minor) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in dB */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the song */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the song */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist (0-100) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Record labels associated with the artist */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and recognitions received by the artist */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Artists who influenced the artist */,
  "influenced_by" TEXT /* Artists influenced by the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "album_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover image */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "tracklist" TEXT /* JSON array of track names and durations */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  "is_soundtrack" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a soundtrack */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a live recording */,
  "is_deluxe" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a deluxe edition */,
  "is_remastered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is remastered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_albums" (
  "song_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song-album relationship */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song on the album */,
  "is_explicit_album" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_albums_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_albums_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, content manager) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, artists) */,
  "playlists_count" INTEGER /* Number of playlists created by the user */,
  "favorites_count" INTEGER /* Number of songs favorited by the user */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given by the user */,
  "play_history_count" INTEGER /* Number of play events by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  "tracks_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "song_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song when added to the playlist */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is explicit */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has been removed from the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "favorited_date" TEXT /* Date the song was favorited */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is explicit */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the favorite has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is explicit */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "played_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "play_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the play in milliseconds */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is explicit */,
  "is_skipped" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song was skipped */,
  "is_paused" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song was paused */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the play history has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
